headline: Assessing Clorox (CLX) Valuation After A Sharp 30 Day Share Price Reset
summary: Why Clorox Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Clorox (CLX) has caught investor attention after a sharp month return of about a 19% decline, contrasting with a roughly 4% gain over the past 3 months and modest year to date strength. See our latest analysis for Clorox. The sharp 30-day share price decline of about 19% comes after a 3-month share price return of 3.7%, while the 1-year total shareholder return decline of 27% reflects weaker long-term sentiment and fading momentum at the current...
